nasb.text: but in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he is about to sound, then the mystery of God is finished, as He preached to His servants the prophets.

esv.text: but that in the days of the trumpet call to be sounded by the seventh angel, the mystery of God would be fulfilled, just as he announced to his servants the prophets.

cnv.text: 到第七位天使吹號的時候，　神向他的僕人眾先知所宣告的奧祕，就要實現了。”

ccb.text: 等第七位天使吹响号角时，上帝奥秘的计划就实现了，正如上帝向祂的奴仆——众先知所宣告的。”

csbs.text: 在第七位天使要吹响号角的那些日子里，神的奥秘就要成就，就像神向他的奴仆先知们所宣告的那样。”
